command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|;|&&|\|\|)[[:space:]]*pip3?[[:space:]]'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"Use uv instead of pip."}}' && exit 0; fi; exit 0
